creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
A -CURRENT system as of commit 901df07a4768 with both of the following patches applied on top of each other:

https://people.freebsd.org/~manu/0001-linuxkpi-Try-to-unbreak-linux_i2cbb.patch

https://people.freebsd.org/~avg/0001-fixup-linuxkpi-Try-to-unbreak-linux_i2cbb.patch

has been verified to work with drm-510-kmod.

If these patches are committed, this PR can be closed as resolved (and probably bug #265920 too).

Thanks a lot for fixing this issue!
